hooks.name: post-agent-update
hooks.description: Auto-pull from CXAS after update_agent calls and remind to sync callbacks

hooks.name: post-agent-push
hooks.description: Remind to commit after cxas-eval push and auto-set app ID

hooks.name: post-eval-run
hooks.description: Remind to generate combined report after eval runs

hooks.name: post-callback-write
hooks.description: Remind to run callback tests after callback code changes

hooks.name: post-agent-edit-lint
hooks.description: Run linter after editing agent files in cxas_app/

hooks.name: pre-eval-run
hooks.description: Auto-push local code to CXAS before running evals

hooks.name: pre-agent-push
hooks.description: Block push if local files are stale vs platform (drift detection)

hooks.name: pre-agent-push-lint
hooks.description: Lint before pushing to CXAS — block on errors

hooks.name: block-script-via-shell
hooks.description: Block shell heredoc/redirect creation of .py scripts

hooks.name: pre-agent-edit
hooks.description: Auto-pull from CXAS before editing agent files in cxas_app/

hooks.name: block-script-creation
hooks.description: Block creation of throwaway .py scripts — use inline python or bundled scripts instead
